sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Decoding Howmet Aerospace Inc (HWM): A Strategic SWOT Insight
feed.summary: Howmet Aerospace Inc (HWM) exhibits significant strengths in technological expertise and market leadership within the aerospace, commercial transportation, and industrial sectors. However, the company faces weaknesses such as reliance on a limited number of suppliers and labor market challenges. While opportunities lie in aerospace market expansion and product innovation, intense competition and customer concentration pose notable threats to its future prospects.

feed.title: USF and Tampa General expand partnership with GE HealthCare to advance surgical training
feed.summary: The University of South Florida's CAMLS has installed GE HealthCare’s Allia Moveo image-guided therapy system, making it the first site in Florida and third globally to adopt the platform. This expands an existing collaboration between USF Health, Tampa General Hospital, and GE HealthCare, integrating the system into education programs for students and clinicians. The partnership aims to enhance surgical training and patient care with advanced minimally invasive and endovascular procedures.

feed.title: HIVE Digital to report Q3 results on Feb. 17
feed.summary: HIVE Digital Technologies Ltd. (NASDAQ: HIVE) is scheduled to release its financial results for the nine months ending December 31, 2025, on February 17, 2026, followed by an earnings call. The company, which is involved in diversified blockchain and AI infrastructure, experienced strong operational growth in January 2026, marked by a significant increase in hashrate and Bitcoin production. HIVE attributes its consistent performance to its geographically diversified data centers across Canada, Sweden, and Paraguay, supporting both Bitcoin mining and AI computing workloads.

feed.title: Kinsale Capital Group (KNSL) Q4 Earnings: How Key Metrics Compare to Wall Street Estimates
feed.summary: Kinsale Capital Group (KNSL) reported Q4 2025 revenue of $483.27 million and EPS of $5.81, surpassing Wall Street estimates. The company's key metrics, such as combined ratio and loss ratio, also outperformed analyst expectations. Shares of Kinsale Capital Group have seen a positive return over the past month, outperforming the S&P 500.

feed.title: Matthijs Glastra Sells 7,500 Shares of Novanta (NASDAQ:NOVT) Stock
feed.summary: Novanta Inc. CEO Matthijs Glastra sold 7,500 shares of the company's stock on February 10th for over $1 million, reducing his stake by 11.56%. This follows other recent sales by Glastra in January. Despite the insider selling, institutional investors like Vanguard and Allspring Global Investments have increased their holdings, and analysts maintain a consensus "Hold" rating for Novanta.

feed.title: Materion (NYSE: MTRN) grows 2025 sales while margins face quality charges
feed.summary: Materion Corporation (MTRN) reported increased net sales of $1.79 billion in 2025, driven by Electronic Materials and Precision Optics, despite a decline in value-added sales to $1.05 billion and pressure on gross margins due to lower volumes and a $25.7 million charge from a quality issue in its Performance Materials segment. Despite these margin pressures, operating profit doubled to $109.8 million and diluted EPS rose to $3.58, partly benefiting from the absence of prior-year impairments. The company's annual report highlighted resilience in top-line growth but also outlined various structural risks, including cyclical end markets, raw material volatility, and regulatory challenges.

feed.title: Freeport McMoRan (FCX) Valuation After Analyst Upgrades And Earnings Estimate Revisions
feed.summary: Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) is under renewed scrutiny after analyst upgrades and increased earnings estimates, despite a recent 5.22% share price dip. While a common narrative values FCX at $44.08, suggesting it's 40.7% overvalued based on current market price of $62.04, Simply Wall St's Discounted Cash Flow model indicates the stock is undervalued by 27.5%, with a fair value of $85.59. The article encourages investors to analyze different valuation perspectives and consider factors like copper demand and operational risks.

feed.title: UPLIZNA’s Expanded EU Use in Autoimmune Disease Could Be A Game Changer For Amgen (AMGN)
feed.summary: Amgen has received European Commission approval for UPLIZNA (inebilizumab) as an add-on therapy for adults with generalized myasthenia gravis, expanding its use in rare autoimmune conditions. This approval provides a twice-yearly maintenance option, reinforcing Amgen's presence in immunology. While this strengthens the rare autoimmune growth story, the company's broader investment narrative still focuses on managing pricing pressure, biosimilar competition, and the success of late-stage assets against its 2026 revenue and EPS guidance.

feed.title: Assessing Phillips 66 (PSX) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum
feed.summary: Phillips 66 (PSX) has shown mixed short-term stock performance but stronger returns over the past month and year. Despite trading slightly above analyst targets, an internal model suggests the stock is undervalued, with a fair value of $268.71 compared to its recent close of $156.26. This assessment is based on factors like its industry position, operational efficiency, growth initiatives, and financial performance, suggesting potential for higher profit margins if strategic assumptions hold true.

feed.title: Walmart Inc., Walmart Foundation provide $1 million in winter storm aid across southeast U.S.
feed.summary: Walmart Inc. and the Walmart Foundation have committed $1 million in aid to communities in the southeastern U.S. affected by a recent winter storm. This support includes grants to organizations like the American Red Cross and Salvation Army, along with supplies and electronic gift cards, to assist with emergency shelter, meals, and essential resources for those impacted by the severe weather.

feed.title: Jet.AI Inc., an innovator in the private aviation sector, recently announced that its strategic partner Flyexclusive Inc. has further agreed to allow Jet.AI Inc. to pursue certain additional merger and acquisition opportunities.
feed.summary: Jet.AI Inc. announced that its strategic partner, Flyexclusive Inc., has granted it permission to pursue additional merger and acquisition opportunities. This agreement is expected to expand Jet.AI Inc.'s business scope and strengthen its market presence, indicating a deepening partnership between the two companies.

feed.title: DEXCOM INC SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: Dexcom Inc. has released its 2025 10-K report, highlighting significant financial growth with revenue up 16% to $4,662.0 million and net income increasing by 45% to $836.3 million. The report details strategic initiatives such as expanding product offerings with the G7 and Stelo systems, increasing global presence, and investing in new manufacturing facilities. Dexcom also outlines challenges including pricing and reimbursement risks, product development hurdles, operational vulnerabilities, and regulatory compliance issues.

feed.title: Infosys Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 13 Feb 2026
feed.summary: Infosys Ltd experienced a significant intraday decline on February 13, 2026, reaching a new 52-week low of Rs 1281.55 due to intense price pressure and high volatility. The stock underperformed both its sector and the broader Sensex, extending a three-day losing streak and falling below all key moving averages. This reflects strong market headwinds and sector-wide weakness, leading to a downgrade in its Mojo Grade to 'Hold'.

feed.title: Heritage Global Inc: Small-Cap Auction Specialist Tests Investor Patience As Momentum Cools
feed.summary: Heritage Global Inc. (HGBL) is experiencing a cooling phase after a significant multi-month rally, leading investors to question if this is a healthy consolidation or a potential reversal. The company, which specializes in asset liquidation and valuation services, saw its stock double in the past year due to a favorable market for distressed assets. However, current subdued trading and a lack of Wall Street coverage mean future performance will hinge on interest rates, credit conditions, and management's ability to scale its platforms.

feed.title: Linde plc: The Quiet Climate Workhorse Powering the Next Industrial Revolution
feed.summary: Linde plc is emerging as a critical enabler in the next industrial revolution, transforming industrial gases into a strategic climate and productivity platform. The company's technology is vital for semiconductors, green hydrogen, and industrial decarbonization efforts, offering integrated solutions built around gas production, engineering, and low-carbon innovations. Linde's product platform, characterized by decarbonization as a core feature, digitalized gas supply as a service, and deep sector specialization, positions it as a resilient force in a capital-intensive industry, driving its stock to all-time highs.

feed.title: West Pharmaceutical Services Margins Slip To 16.3% Raising Questions Around Bullish Growth Narratives
feed.summary: West Pharmaceutical Services (WST) reported its FY 2025 third-quarter results, showing a slip in net profit margins from 17.4% to 16.3% and 6% revenue growth, which trails the broader US market. Despite analyst consensus forecasting margin improvement and future revenue potential driven by GLP-1 and high-value product components, the company's P/E ratio of 35.6x is significantly higher than peers and its DCF fair value, raising concerns for cautious investors. The article highlights a tension between bullish growth narratives and current financial performance, noting that current figures challenge some market expectations.

feed.title: Akralos Venture Puts ADM Animal Nutrition And Valuation In Focus
feed.summary: ADM and Alltech have launched Akralos, a joint venture in North American animal nutrition that is now fully operational. This venture combines ADM’s feed operations with Alltech’s brands, positioning Akralos as one of the largest animal feed and nutrition platforms in North America. For investors, this development ties into ADM’s existing agricultural processing and animal feed business, with potential implications for competition and resource allocation, though profit margin and earning concerns remain risks.

feed.title: Bangchak Buys Chevron’s HK Unit as the Thai Firm Expands in Asia
feed.summary: Bangchak Corp. is set to acquire Chevron’s Hong Kong fuel business for $270 million, marking a strategic move to accelerate the Thai energy company's overseas expansion. The acquisition includes Chevron Hong Kong Ltd., which operates gas stations and industrial and marine fuel businesses in the territory. This deal highlights Bangchak's focus on growing its presence in Asia.

feed.title: Earnings Preview: Garrett Motion (GTX) Q4 Earnings Expected to Decline
feed.summary: Garrett Motion (GTX) is expected to announce a year-over-year decline in Q4 earnings despite higher revenues for the quarter ended December 2025. The Zacks Consensus Estimate predicts earnings of $0.35 per share, a 25.5% decrease, on revenues of $871.55 million, up 3.3%. The company's Earnings ESP is positive at +7.90%, suggesting a potential for an earnings beat, though its Zacks Rank #4 makes a conclusive prediction difficult.

feed.title: Four Corners Property Trust, Inc. SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: Four Corners Property Trust, Inc. (FCPT) has released its 2025 10-K report, revealing robust financial performance with total revenues of $294.1 million and a net income of $112.5 million, alongside an AFFO per diluted share of $1.78. The REIT's strategic initiatives include expanding its real estate portfolio through acquisitions, diversifying its tenant base, and maintaining a strong balance sheet. FCPT acknowledges market, operational, and financial risks, particularly its concentration in certain tenants and geographies, and plans to mitigate these through diversification and hedging strategies.

feed.title: SeaStar Medical price target lowered to $6 from $10 at Maxim
feed.summary: Maxim has lowered its price target for SeaStar Medical (ICU) to $6 from $10, while maintaining a Buy rating on the shares. This adjustment comes after the company announced positive early clinical experience from its QUELIMMUNE therapy. The lowered price target primarily reflects SeaStar Medical's recent share dilution.

feed.title: Analysis of Short Selling in Utilities Sector
feed.summary: Hawaiian Electric Industries (HE) and Otter Tail (OTTR) exhibit the highest short interests in the utilities sector, indicating significant bearish sentiment. This contrasts with Brookfield Infrastructure Partners (BIP) and Eversource Energy (ES), which show low short interests and relative stability. Wall Street analysts have issued "Sell" ratings for Hawaiian Electric, diverging from Seeking Alpha's "Hold" rating, and highlight legislative and pricing concerns as key risks.

feed.title: Melco Resorts posts US$61mln net profit in 4Q, operating income up 51pct
feed.summary: Melco Resorts & Entertainment Ltd reported a net profit of US$60.6 million in the fourth quarter of 2025, a significant improvement from a loss in the previous year, with operating revenues increasing by 8.6 percent to US$1.29 billion. The company's full-year 2025 net profit reached US$185.0 million on revenues of US$5.16 billion, driven by stronger gaming performance and disciplined cost management, particularly in Macau. Despite competitive pressures in the Philippines and specific event-related operational costs impacting Q4 margins, the group reallocated gaming machines from closed satellite operations to its main properties like City of Dreams and Studio City.

feed.title: Missouri Proving to be an Attractive Area for Data Centers
feed.summary: Missouri is emerging as an attractive location for data centers, driven by regulatory improvements that have created significant investment opportunities for utilities like Ameren. This trend is expected to support growth for companies in the region, as highlighted by increased capital investment plans and strong data center pipelines.

feed.title: Pentair (PNR) Is Up 5.0% After Elevating Strategy And Digital Leadership – Has The Bull Case Changed?
authors: Simply Wall St Reviewed by Sasha Jovanovic
feed.summary: Pentair (PNR) saw a 5.0% stock increase after reporting strong Q4 2025 and full-year sales, alongside a strategic leadership restructuring that combines technology, digital, and innovation under a new Chief Strategy, Innovation, and Digital Officer role. The company also upgraded its 2026 earnings outlook, projecting GAAP EPS between US$4.94 and US$5.09 and sales growth of 3% to 4%. This realignment aims to integrate operations, innovation, and capital allocation more tightly, potentially influencing Pentair's long-term investment narrative through higher-margin, digitally enabled offerings.

feed.title: McGraw Hill (MH) Q3 Loss Rekindles Debate On Margin Turnaround Narrative
feed.summary: McGraw Hill (MH) recently reported a Q3 2026 basic EPS loss of US$0.11 and a net income loss of US$20.2 million, prompting renewed discussion about the company's margin turnaround prospects. While bulls point to narrowing losses over five years and forecast earnings growth with recurring digital revenue, skeptics highlight current unprofitability, volatile quarterly results, and slower revenue growth projections compared to the broader market. The debate centers on whether the company's anticipated margin improvements can offset modest revenue growth and past volatility to lead to sustained profitability.

feed.title: Analog Devices Inc. Is Quietly Eating the Chip World – Is This Stock Your Next Power Move?
feed.summary: Analog Devices Inc. (ADI) is presented as a quietly powerful semiconductor company, contrasting with flashy AI stocks. The article suggests ADI, a leader in analog and mixed-signal semiconductors, is a potential long-term investment due to its strong financial performance, diversified market exposure in industrial, automotive, and communications sectors, and ability to command strong margins. It positions ADI as a "cop" for long-term, fundamentals-first investors, offering stability and growth in essential technology applications.

feed.title: Applied Materials’ stock jumps after earnings. The CEO just made a bold prediction for the chip sector.
feed.summary: Applied Materials' stock jumped 13% in extended trading after its earnings report, leading to what could be its best post-earnings reaction since 1999. The CEO predicts over 20% growth in semiconductor-equipment revenue for the year, anticipating AI will boost overall chip-industry sales to $1 trillion. This optimism stems from the company's strong position in chip equipment vital for the AI boom.

feed.title: Lear Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend
feed.summary: Lear Corporation announced that its Board of Directors declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.77 per share on the Company's common stock. The dividend will be payable on March 25, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 5, 2026. Lear Corporation is a global automotive technology leader in Seating and E-Systems, headquartered in Southfield, Michigan.

feed.title: ROSEN, HIGHLY REGARDED INVESTOR COUNSEL, Encourages Ultragenyx Pharmaceutical Inc. Investors to Secure Counsel Before Important Deadline in Securities Class Action - RARE
feed.summary: Rosen Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit against Ultragenyx Pharmaceutical Inc. (NASDAQ: RARE) on behalf of investors who purchased common stock between August 3, 2023, and December 26, 2025. The lawsuit alleges that Ultragenyx made misleading statements and concealed material adverse facts regarding the potential of its drug setrusumab, specifically concerning its correlation with a decrease in annualized fracture rates. Investors are encouraged to secure counsel before the April 6, 2026, deadline to serve as lead plaintiff.

feed.title: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Appoints John Chidsey CEO
feed.summary: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Ltd. (NCLH) has appointed John W. Chidsey as its new President and Chief Executive Officer, effective immediately. Mr. Chidsey, previously a director of NCLH and former CEO of Subway Restaurants, succeeds Harry Sommer. The company also expects its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 results to align with prior guidance, with full details to be released on March 2, 2026.

feed.title: Mirova US LLC Boosts Alphabet Inc. Class A Stake
feed.summary: Mirova US LLC, managed by Philippe Zaouati, recently increased its stake in Alphabet Inc. Class A (GOOGL) by 19,424 shares. The stock has seen significant growth over the past year, driven by strong Q4 2025 results, re-accelerating Search and YouTube ads, and robust cloud growth fueled by Gemini-led AI adoption. TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, rates GOOGL as "Outperform" due to its financial performance and technical uptrend, though it notes concerns about premium valuation and potential near-term pressure on margins from a large 2026 investment ramp.

feed.title: Magnolia Oil & Gas Corp SEC 10-K Report
feed.summary: Magnolia Oil & Gas Corp (MGY) has released its 2025 10-K report, detailing a slight decrease in total revenues to $1,311.8 million and net income to $337.3 million due to lower oil prices and higher operating expenses, despite increased production. The company continues to focus on its Eagle Ford Shale and Austin Chalk operations, aiming for long-term shareholder value through organic growth and disciplined capital management, including a share repurchase program. Challenges include volatile oil and gas prices, operational risks from drilling techniques, evolving environmental regulations, and financial risks related to indebtedness, all managed through cost reduction and strategic capital allocation.

feed.title: Mirova US LLC Boosts Apple Inc Stake by 15,420 Shares
feed.summary: Mirova US LLC, managed by Philippe Zaouati, recently increased its stake in Apple Inc (AAPL) by 15,420 shares. Apple's stock has shown positive trading, with analysts maintaining a "Moderate Buy" view and projecting significant upside due to strong demand and growth in Services and AI. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates AAPL as "Outperform" based on strong financial performance and a constructive earnings outlook.

feed.title: KD Investors Have Opportunity to Lead Kyndryl Holdings, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit Filed by The Rosen Law Firm
feed.summary: The Rosen Law Firm has filed a class action lawsuit on behalf of purchasers of Kyndryl Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: KD) securities between August 7, 2024, and February 9, 2026. Investors who purchased Kyndryl securities during this period may be entitled to compensation and have until April 13, 2026, to move the Court to serve as lead plaintiff. The lawsuit alleges that Kyndryl made false and misleading statements regarding its financial statements and internal controls, causing damages to investors.

feed.title: Mohawk Industries Reports $42 Million in Fourth-Quarter Earnings
feed.summary: Mohawk Industries Inc. reported fourth-quarter earnings of $42 million, translating to $2.00 per share after adjustments, slightly exceeding Wall Street expectations. However, quarterly revenue of $2.7 billion fell just short of projections. For the full year, the flooring manufacturer achieved a profit of $369.9 million (or $5.93 per share) on revenues of $10.79 billion.

feed.title: Brandes Investment Partners LP Cuts Alphabet Inc. Class C Stake
feed.summary: Brandes Investment Partners LP, managed by Charles Brandes, has reduced its stake in Alphabet Inc. Class C (GOOG) by 66,547 shares. Despite this cut, Alphabet Class C has seen significant gains over the past year, and Wall Street analysts maintain a Strong Buy consensus due to strong financial performance, accelerating Search revenue, and Google Cloud growth. However, analysts note potential pressure on near-term cash flow from a planned large capital expenditure in 2026 for AI and cloud infrastructure.

feed.title: Federal Realty Investment Trust Q4 Earnings Call Highlights
feed.summary: Federal Realty Investment Trust reported solid Q4 2025 earnings with 6.4% FFO growth and record leasing momentum, achieving the highest annual square footage leased in company history. The company provided a cautious 2026 outlook, guiding NAREIT/core FFO to $7.42–$7.52 per share despite a refinancing headwind. Management highlighted active portfolio recycling, including $340M in acquisitions and significant residential development, contributing to continued strategic expansion and value monetization.

feed.title: PRIMECAP Management Co cuts Alphabet Inc. Class A stake
feed.summary: PRIMECAP Management Co, managed by Theofanis Kolokotrones, significantly reduced its stake in Alphabet Inc. Class A (GOOGL) by selling 648,925 shares. This transaction follows a period where Alphabet Class A shares surged by 66%-78% over the past year, driven by strong Q4 2025 results, re-accelerating Search, Cloud growth, and rapid AI adoption. Despite this cut, analysts maintain bullish price targets for GOOGL, citing Google's AI advancements and robust cloud backlog, while Spark AI Analyst also rates GOOGL as "Outperform" due to strong financial performance and technical uptrend, albeit with concerns about premium valuation and near-term investment ramp.

feed.title: PRIMECAP Management Co trims Alphabet Inc. Class C stake
feed.summary: PRIMECAP Management Co, managed by Theofanis Kolokotrones, recently reduced its stake in Alphabet Inc. Class C (GOOG) by 364,306 shares. Despite this trim, Alphabet Class C has seen significant growth over the past year, with strong analyst consensus for further upside, especially driven by accelerating Search revenue and Google Cloud's surge. Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, rates GOOG as Outperform due to strong financial performance and technical trends, though it notes risks related to premium valuation and substantial 2026 CapEx plans.

feed.title: Randolph Co Inc Cuts Broadcom Inc. Stake by 67,877 Shares
feed.summary: Randolph Co Inc, managed by Carter F. Randolph, has reduced its stake in Broadcom Inc. (AVGO) by 67,877 shares. Despite recent volatility and an 8-9% drop in share price, Wall Street maintains a Strong Buy rating for Broadcom, projecting significant upside due to its leadership in AI custom chips and data-center networking. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates AVGO as "Outperform" based on strong financials and accelerating AI growth, despite concerns about stretched valuation and a mixed technical picture.

feed.title: PRIMECAP Management Co Trims Walmart Inc. Stake by 37K Shares
feed.summary: PRIMECAP Management Co, managed by Theofanis Kolokotrones, reduced its stake in Walmart Inc. (WMT) by 37,000 shares. Despite a recent mild pullback, Walmart's stock has climbed 25-29% over the past year, with Wall Street maintaining a Strong Buy view due to its e-commerce expansion and tech-driven transformation. Spark, TipRanks' AI Analyst, rates WMT as an Outperform, citing strong financial performance and a positive earnings outlook, despite high valuation concerns.

feed.title: What’s driving gold’s wild ride in 2026: Stocks & Markets Podcast
feed.summary: The Stocks & Markets Podcast discusses the volatility of gold prices in early 2026. Portfolio manager David Miller attributes gold's strength to the weaponization of the SWIFT banking system against Russia, which caused other nations to seek hard-currency assets not subject to seizure, and excessive U.S. government spending leading to dollar debasement. Miller predicts continued volatility and a bull market for gold, despite recent sharp declines.

feed.title: The Truth About SLM Corp (Sallie Mae): Why Everyone Is Watching This Stock Right Now
feed.summary: This article examines SLM Corp (Sallie Mae) and its stock, analyzing why it's generating buzz amid renewed student loan repayments and shifting forgiveness rules. It delves into the company's current focus on private education loans, its stock performance, earnings potential, and the risks involved, including market volatility and public perception regarding student debt. The author advises investors to understand SLM's business model and volatility before considering it for their portfolio.

feed.title: The Truth About Penumbra Inc: Why Wall Street Is Watching While TikTok Sleeps On It
feed.summary: Penumbra Inc. (PEN) is a medical technology company specializing in minimally invasive devices for stroke and vascular issues, attracting Wall Street attention despite low social media buzz. The article highlights Penumbra's critical role in healthcare, operating in a highly regulated market with significant barriers to entry, making it a compelling long-term investment for those focused on medical innovation rather than viral trends. Investors are advised to research the company's financials, product pipelines, and regulatory landscape, rather than relying on short-term market hype.

feed.title: Madrigal Equity Awards Highlight Shift From Development Story To Commercial Growth
feed.summary: Madrigal Pharmaceuticals (NasdaqGS:MDGL) recently granted equity awards to 21 new non-executive employees, signaling a strategic shift from a development-focused company to one prioritizing commercial growth after the FDA and EC approval of its MASH treatment, Rezdiffra. These inducement awards are designed to align new hires with shareholder interests and attract talent in a competitive market as Madrigal builds its commercial and operational teams. Investors should monitor how this expanded headcount links to commercial milestones, revenue traction, and expense trends, especially given the increased fixed costs and potential for dilution.

feed.title: CarMax taps former IHG chief Keith Barr as CEO
feed.summary: CarMax has appointed Keith Barr, former CEO of InterContinental Hotels Group, as its new chief executive, effective March 16. Barr will lead the used-car retailer through a turnaround plan amidst challenges like lower demand and margin pressures, as the company previously acknowledged a need for change after its former CEO stepped down.

feed.title: CarParts.com Sets Fourth Quarter 2025 Conference Call for Thursday, March 5, 2026
feed.summary: CarParts.com, Inc. will host a conference call on Thursday, March 5, 2026, at 2:00 p.m. Pacific Time to discuss its financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ended January 3, 2026. The results will be released in a press release before the call, which will be led by CEO David Meniane and Interim CFO Mark DiSiena, and accessible via a live webcast on the company's investor relations website.

feed.title: Historic Baton Rouge Hilton on riverfront sells for $40.5M
feed.summary: Marcus & Millichap has announced the $40.5 million sale of the Hilton Baton Rouge Capitol Center, a 291-room hotel. Northshore Development, based in Orlando, Florida, purchased the historic property. The hotel is a prominent downtown Baton Rouge asset, and the new ownership plans a targeted repositioning strategy in the LSU-anchored market.

feed.title: Marcus & Millichap Facilitates $40 Million Hospitality Asset Sale in Baton Rouge
feed.summary: Marcus & Millichap announced the sale of the Hilton Baton Rouge Capitol Center for $40.5 million. The 291-room hotel was purchased by Northshore Development, based in Orlando, Florida. This complex transaction involved multiple stakeholders and positions the new ownership for a targeted repositioning and operational strategy in the Louisiana State University-anchored market.
